name: RPlog_Death_of_Orson_Tighe
title: The Death of Orson Tighe
summary: On a Nar Shaddaa landing pad, the fledgling Jedi mechanic Orson Tighe confronts the corrupted Selas warrior Simon Sezirok in a final duel, having resolved with his beloved Jessalyn Valios that Simon must be destroyed. The young woman Jessica Marama, whom Simon has drawn to his side, watches helplessly as the two ignite their blades and clash in a furious, acrobatic lightsaber battle, trading taunts about Jessalyn and Talon Karrde. Simon twists himself into a horned, monstrous Dark Side form, and Orson assaults his mind with images of love and compassion, drawing the watching dark warrior Morganna and the distraught Mailyn Raines to the scene. Orson finally fashions a longer blue-green light-lance and runs Simon through the gut, but the dying Selas seizes his weapon arm and, with his last strength, carves Orson diagonally in two. Both warriors fall dead, and Orson, his bitterness and burdens melting away in death, at last finds peace and his true name: Jedi.
